# CrowdSec community blocklist — synthetic test fixture
# Mirrors the expected plain-IP-per-line format of the operator-configured
# CrowdSec Console blocklist download. Comment lines start with `#` and
# must be ignored.
#
# Real-world entries are bare IPs (one per line). The shared CIDR parser
# (`parseCidrFeedBody`) treats a bare IP as `/32` via `parseCidr`, so this
# fixture mixes a few CIDRs to exercise both paths.
198.51.100.7
198.51.100.8
203.0.113.0/24
# malformed line below — must warn-and-skip, not throw
not-an-ip
192.0.2.99
